{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181414382DDDBF3810A9CBD33B"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603686959963636505","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的非常不错，情节爽快刺激，无敌设定与红颜元素吸睛，打脸桥段解气，是放松消遣的佳作。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770372872,"group_id":"7591299072128977944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"玄幻猎奇，联想文开山鼻祖，擅长写玄幻，每次开书要么精品，要么劲爆！每次发新书前，都会制作相关短剧！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2lGH5iv4jRxYzo9e0VB+8uOJhJHvt8vMR+2WZgJm6mE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f2a51a9299a0448fa9179563f4539573~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788601&x-signature=LLMcXQpCQGmDRpYfVnZG8LzLB7k%3D","user_id":"2696422737584856","user_name":"水灵喵尊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2696422737584856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591299072128977944","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌流+神医+美女环绕+打脸爽文】
开局即巅峰——
路遇冰山女总裁钱芊芊寒毒爆发，名医断言"准备后事"，叶玄十秒妙手回春，指尖纯阳真气直接把她从冰雕拉回人间。
美女总裁震惊："你要什么报酬？"
叶玄坏笑："肉偿打八折？"
师姐是商界女皇——
刚入城就撞上师姐楚元元，云城第一女强人秒变粘人小妖精，当众挂他身上狂亲！
"师弟，世贸大楼送你当宿舍！这张黑金卡没上限，随便刷！"
"敢欺负我师弟？赵家是吧？全面封杀！"
未婚妻遍地走——
昆仑集团神秘股东楚元元？偷看他洗澡的青梅竹马。
冰山总裁钱芊芊？疑似婚书名单之一。
"老头子说我有七个未婚妻，难道都是这种绝色？"
反派？直接碾碎！
富二代赵天龙送上门求打脸？一脚踹飞，连赵家一起宣战！
"老东西，洗干净脖子等着，爷爷去收你人头！"
看叶玄如何以无敌之姿，横扫都市，收尽红颜，将一个个豪门世家踩在脚下！
爽点保证：
十秒治病，神医降维打击
师姐宠弟狂魔，无脑护短
霸道总裁、冰山御姐、神秘师姐妹全收
反派智商在线但就是干不过主角
开局就怼顶级豪门，节奏爆炸
"别问，问就是你爷爷叶玄来了！"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1dc0aa9656ffcd9eb438fbbcb162304f","author":"向兰","author_id":"","book_id":"7591299072128977944","book_name":"神医下山：开局救了女总裁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2332人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591300073309340184","read_count":"2332","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"590233"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"185","tags":"都市修真,都市,神医,多女主,无敌,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o37bea6d7f329b846f24e034943d45c91~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444854&x-signature=Gt81c%2BH1T3zW4Rb0eMIrVbEnZvI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104946713454","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181414382DDDBF3810A9CBD33B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
